meta.reasoning: Pocket threes pre-flop UTG. Calling 20 to set-mine in a 4-way pot. Small pair best played by seeing a flop cheaply and folding if no set.

meta.reasoning_summary: Ah 8d from the button (dealer seat). Strong hand in position with an ace. s4 limped in, blinds still to act. Raising to 70 (3.5x BB) to isolate and play in position. Positional advantage makes this a profitable spot to apply pressure.
meta.hand_strength: A8o - top 20% hand, strong from late position

meta.reasoning: J2o is a weak hand. Facing a raise to 70 out of position (small blind), with two players yet to act. Not worth calling 60 more chips with this holding.
Pocket fives, set mining. Call 50 into 120 pot. Deep stacks give good implied odds if I flop a set. Too marginal for a 3-bet, too early to fold a pocket pair.

result.summary: s4 wins by chip lead after 30 hands (s4: 3100, s2: 900). Biggest pot: 3900. Showdowns: 28.
